title: Born in Chaos: Forgotten Content
description: Re-implements removed content from Born in Chaos!
body:
># Born in Chaos: Forgotten Content ### An addon for Born in Chaos which re-implements some removed features ![All the features of the mod in one screenshot, with the mod title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0694451835129e1ad9106a632aa557e77e8f23f.png)
### Join our discord to stay up to date with mod updates, teasers, and more! (click) [![Discord banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cea9cd7dc8511b56c21d5eef30b040a9f9f81d2.png)](https://discord.gg/mEYDh4SUWN) **Requires GeckoLib and Born in Chaos!** (Report bugs on the [curseforge page](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos-forgotten-content/issues) or the discord server)
**DISCLAIMER: THE CONCEPTS IN THIS MOD WERE ORIGINALLY CREATED BY MONGOOSE_ARTIST. THEIR MOD PROFILE CAN BE FOUND HERE** >### MOBS #### Wither Scuttler A small spider capable of inflicting the Wither effect on its target. Has 15 health, and has a very rare chance of dropping a wither rose ![A few wither scuttlers amongst some cobwebs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a88c57a43c63a6bc14b1a6fc4921bbe17b764820.png) #### Shy Spirit A type of spirit that dealing very low damage, but when attacked, it will give the player blindness and slowness, and then disappears. You can bottle it with a glass bottle for a Spirit in a Bottle. ![A few shy spirits at night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/052b56628d5120ae391e0684010cec26a5f0590a.png) >### ITEMS #### Spirit in a Bottle Obtained by clicking a shy spirit with a glass bottle, it can be consumed to gain Speed and Night Vision. It is also needed to make the Mystic Lollipop. #### Mystic Lollipop Made with a stick, 3 spirit in a bottles, 2 sugar, and one seed of chaos, it can be eaten infinitely, but has a cooldown ![Both the Mystic Lollipop and Spirit in a Bottle in item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0f61d03603c13ec778598e9cbb4401e82da3693.png)
### Check out some of my other mods!
